meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Solve SaaS Bottlenecks for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with SaaS architecture. Use our Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship high-end production apps at record speed for clients.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity template provides a pre-architected, production-ready foundation that eliminates the 'no SaaS knowledge' hurdle. By pairing it with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate, enforce security, and ship complex features in hours rather than weeks, allowing you to scale your freelance output and command premium project rates.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the freelancer’s graveyard. You have the design skills and the client's vision, but the complex infrastructure of a modern SaaS—authentication, database schemas, and API middleware—often stalls your momentum for weeks. You are losing billable hours to architectural paralysis while your competitors are already deploying features.

We built the Antigravity template to flip the script. It is not just boilerplate; it is an opinionated, high-octane framework designed to bypass the 'SaaS learning curve' entirely. By leveraging Antigravity alongside Claude Code, you transition from a coder stuck in documentation loops to an elite architect capable of shipping production-grade SaaS products on demand.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish the project scaffolding to ensure consistent folder structure and environment configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity core template with Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Configure Identity & Auth Layers
steps.description: Implement enterprise-grade authentication without writing custom boilerplate code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up secure authentication endpoints and user profile schema using the Antigravity auth-module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file auth-setup.md --task 'Initialize Clerk or Supabase Auth'

steps.title: Define Domain-Driven Database Schemas
steps.description: Map your client's data requirements to the database layer using automated migration scripts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Prisma schema for a multi-tenant subscription model based on the provided project requirements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate and run Prisma migrations for multi-tenant SaaS'

steps.title: Integrate API Middleware & Edge Functions
steps.description: Deploy scalable backend logic that handles requests efficiently without server overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build an API route for handling Stripe subscription webhooks with error logging and data validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create API route for Stripe webhook processing'

steps.title: Automate Deployment & CI/CD Pipelines
steps.description: Ship your application to production environments with one-click deployment readiness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow file to automate testing and deployment to Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Configure GitHub Actions for automated deployment'

pro_tips: Use Claude Code's memory feature to store common client-specific architectural patterns to reuse across multiple projects.
Always override the Antigravity default UI components with your own design system early to prevent 'template look'.
Run 'claude code' inside the project root to let the agent index your entire codebase before asking for complex refactors.
Leverage edge functions for any compute-heavy tasks to keep your primary application bundle size minimal.
Use the Antigravity 'dry-run' flag during scaffolding to audit the generated file structure before committing to disk.
content.next_steps: Once your project is deployed, audit the performance using Lighthouse and integrate an error-tracking tool like Sentry to ensure your client's SaaS remains stable in production.
content.conversion_block: Stop reinventing the wheel and start shipping value. Our community of high-performing freelancers is already scaling their business by automating the boring parts of SaaS development. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
